metadata.description: AWS service icons for DrawIO using built-in mxgraph.aws4 library. Based on AWS Architecture Icons Release 23-2026.01.30 (Part 1 of 2).
metadata.shape_name_format: Space-separated (NOT underscores). E.g., 'step functions', 'kinesis data streams'. Validated against aws4.xml stencil from github.com/jgraph/drawio.
metadata.notes: Part 2 will add: Databases, Developer Tools, End User Computing, Front-End Web & Mobile, Games, IoT, Management Tools, Media Services, Migration & Modernization, Multicloud & Hybrid, Networking & Content Delivery, Quantum Technologies, Satellite, Security & Identity, Serverless, Storage

services.service_name: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink
Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka
Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow
Red Hat OpenShift Service on AWS
